Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that the repeal of this section is effective upon confirmation of the Intellectual Property Enforcement Coordinator by the Senate and publication of such appointment in the Congressional Record. The Senate confirmed the first Intellectual Property Enforcement Coordinator on , as reflected in that day’s Congressional Record. See 155 Cong. Rec. 29389 (2009).Pub.
